name: 46ki75-plugins
description: Personal collection of Claude Code plugins: bundled Agent Skills and workflow hooks.

plugins.name: ai-protocols
plugins.description: Expert knowledge skills for AI agent protocols: A2A, A2UI, AG-UI, and MCP.

plugins.name: qwik
plugins.description: Expert guidance for the Qwik framework (v1 and v2) and its meta-framework (Qwik City / Qwik Router).

plugins.name: web-view-transition
plugins.description: Expert guidance for implementing the View Transition API — same-document (SPA) and cross-document transitions.

plugins.name: wxt
plugins.description: Expert guidance for building browser extensions with WXT — project setup, file-based routing, and APIs.

plugins.name: prompt-evaluation-claude-code
plugins.description: Eval-driven prompt refinement that runs entirely inside Claude Code via the Agent/Task tooling, plus a /capture-eval-case skill that turns observed agent failures into regression eval cases.

plugins.name: authoring
plugins.description: Document authoring skills: Markdown linting/fixing and Mermaid diagram creation.

plugins.name: conventional-commits
plugins.description: Write, format, and review commit messages that follow the Conventional Commits specification.

plugins.name: lefthook
plugins.description: Set up and configure Lefthook, the fast polyglot Git hooks manager: installation, lefthook.yml authoring, the CLI, and bundled full reference docs.

plugins.name: development-standards
plugins.description: Org-internal engineering standards for this organization's projects.

plugins.name: rust
plugins.description: Rust development skills. Currently bundles Toasty ORM (v0.7) guidance.

plugins.name: search-agents
plugins.description: Three research subagents — web-search (general web), aws-search (AWS Knowledge MCP), and microsoft-search (Microsoft Learn MCP) — that classify stable vs. fluid and return cited, freshness-marked answers.

plugins.name: wsl-notification
plugins.description: Sends Claude Code permission-prompt Notifications and Stop events as Windows toast notifications from WSL2 via powershell.exe.
